title: Build a multi-agent system using ADK & MCP
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates building a production-grade multi-agent system using Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK), the Model Context Protocol (MCP), and Gemini 3 Flash. The example application "Critics Cut" is a multilingual, context-aware AI assistant for media discovery.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through building a production-grade multi-agent system with Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK), the Model Context Protocol (MCP), and Gemini 3 Flash. The demo centers on "Critics Cut," a multilingual, context-aware AI assistant for media discovery. The video shows how ADK structures the agents, how MCP connects them to context and tools, and how Gemini 3 Flash drives the underlying reasoning.
